current_focus: All 355 matched units now rebuild from authored source files. Byte-accurate authored reconstruction of OREGON.EXE is complete; the next bottleneck is semantic recovery, starting with the loader/bootstrap path, the exact 0x127EC relocation tail, and replacement of byte-array lifts with readable authoritative code.
